#### `{r} sR$headings$antimicrobial_susceptibility_testing`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-resistance-test.qmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-resistance-test-rate
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$resistance_test_rate_table) &&
    "n_own" %in% rlang::names2(benchmark_data$resistance_test_rate_table) && 
    sum(benchmark_data$resistance_test_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
  
  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$resistance_test_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference

  tbl_data <- benchmark_data$resistance_test_rate_table

  tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      i = dplyr::if_else(.data$cond == "routine", 0, 2),
      abr = ordered(
        paste0(c(.data$abr, .data$cond), collapse = "_"),
        levels = c("3gcr_routine", "car_routine", "car_if_3gcr", "cor_routine",
                   "cor_if_3gcr&car", "mrsa_routine", "vre_routine")),
      .keep = "unused") |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$abr) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      abr = dplyr::case_match(
        .data$abr,
        "3gcr_routine" ~ sR$`3gcr`,
        "car_routine" ~ sR$car,
        "car_if_3gcr" ~ paste0(
          "\\- ",
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$car_if_3gcr,
          collapse = ""),
        "cor_routine" ~ sR$cor,
        "cor_if_3gcr&car" ~ paste0(
          "\\- ",
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$cor_if_3gcr_and_car,
          collapse = ""),
        "mrsa_routine" ~ sR$mrsa,
        "vre_routine" ~ sR$vre),
      .before = 1) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref"))

  if (include_ci) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      dplyr::rename(
        !!sR$table_headers$ci := tidyselect::any_of("ci_lower_own"),
        ci_upper_hide = tidyselect::any_of("ci_upper_own")
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c("ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref")))
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(c(
        "ci_lower_own", "ci_upper_own", "ci_lower_ref", "ci_upper_ref",
        "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref",
        "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref",
        "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref")))
  }

  tbl <- tbl |>
    gt(rowname_col = "abr") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = 13,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = c(
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$rate),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$pooled),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q1),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q2),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q3)),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = "abr") |>
    tab_stub_indent(
      rows = gt::everything(),
      indent = gt::from_column(column = "i")
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        style = "italic"
        ),
      locations = cells_stub(
        rows = abr %in% c("car_if_3gcr","cor_if_3gcr&car")
      )
    ) |>
    cols_hide(columns = "i") |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    )
  
  if (include_ci && sR$table_headers$ci %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$ci, "ci_upper_hide"),
        pattern = "{1}\u2013{2}"
      )
    if ("q1_ci_lower_ref" %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower_ref", "q1_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower_ref", "q2_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        ) |>
        gt::cols_merge(
          columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower_ref", "q3_ci_upper_ref"),
          pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})"
        )
    }
  }

  # Add reference data spanner if exists
  if (has_reference) {
    ci_in_own <- include_ci && sR$table_headers$ci %in% colnames(tbl$`_data`)
    own_cols <- c(sR$table_headers$n, sR$table_headers$rate)
    if (ci_in_own) own_cols <- c(own_cols, sR$table_headers$ci)
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(own_cols),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "reference_data"
      )
    if (ci_in_own) {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        cols_width(
          stub() ~ pct(40),
          sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(8),
          sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$ci ~ pct(12),
          sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(6),
          sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(6),
          sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(8)
        )
    } else {
      tbl <- tbl |>
        cols_width(
          stub() ~ pct(52),
          sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
          sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(6),
          sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(6),
          sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(6)
        )
    }
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(60),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(20),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(20)
      )
  }
  
  # Add footnotes
  tbl <- tbl |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate))
  
  # Add reference footnotes if exists
  if (has_reference) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = md(
          paste0(
            "$$\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_name`,
            "} = \\frac{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_numerator`,
            "}}{\\text{",
            sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_denominator`,
            "}} \\times ",
            format_integer(100),
            "$$"
          )),
        locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "department_data")
      )
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$quartile_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3,
          sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
        ),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)))) |>
      tab_source_note(source_note = sR$pooled_rate_note)
  }

  if (any(tbl_data$n_own < 10, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    sparse_note <- if (include_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
    tbl <- tbl |>
      gt::tab_footnote(footnote = sparse_note)
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}
```

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeOutlierInterpretation"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
  states <- metric_registry$resistance_test_rate_table
  if (has_outliers(states)) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(states, "resistance_test_rate_table", sR, metric_registry)
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  }
}
```
:::
